turns.text: How many car models are produced by each maker? List the count and the maker full name.

turns.query: SELECT Count ( * )  ,  T2.FullName  FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker   =   T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id
turns.predict: SELECT COUNT(*) ,  T1.FullName FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id

turns.text: Which models are the most popular?

turns.query: SELECT T1.model FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker   =   T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id order by count ( * )  desc limit 1
turns.predict: SELECT Model FROM car_names GROUP BY Model ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

turns.text: Which companies have three or more models?

turns.query: SELECT Count ( * )  ,  T2.FullName ,  T2.id FROM MODEL_LIST AS T1 JOIN CAR_MAKERS AS T2 ON T1.Maker   =   T2.Id GROUP BY T2.id having count ( * )   > =  3
turns.predict: SELECT T1.Maker FROM car_makers AS T1 JOIN model_list AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3

turns.text: what is the name of the stadium that does not have a concert in year 2014?

turns.query: SELECT name FROM stadium EXCEPT SELECT T2.name FROM concert AS T1 JOIN stadium AS T2 ON T1.stadium_id   =   T2.stadium_id WHERE T1.year   =   2014
turns.predict: SELECT Name FROM stadium WHERE Stadium_ID NOT IN (SELECT Stadium_ID FROM concert WHERE Year  =  2014)

turns.text: what is the capacity of Balmoor?

turns.query: select Capacity from stadium where name  =  'Balmoor'
turns.predict: SELECT Capacity FROM stadium WHERE Name = "Balmoor"

turns.text: what is the theme of Balmoor?

turns.query: select T2.Theme from stadium as T1 join concert as T2 on T1.Stadium_ID  =  T2.Stadium_ID where T1.Name  =  'Balmoor'
turns.predict: SELECT T2.Theme FROM stadium AS T1 JOIN concert AS T2 ON T1.Stadium_ID  =  T2.Stadium_ID WHERE T1.Name  =  "Balmoor"

turns.text: Hi!  Can you tell me how many unique template IDs there are?

turns.query: SELECT count ( distinct template_id )  FROM Documents

turns.text: How many of those 12 template IDs are used by more than one document?

turns.query: SELECT count ( template_id )  FROM Documents GROUP BY template_id HAVING count ( * )   >  1
turns.predict: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT Template_ID FROM Documents GROUP BY Template_ID HAVING count(*) > 1)

turns.text: Great!  Can you show me the corresponding document that used each of those template IDs on the list you just provided me?

turns.query: SELECT document_id FROM Documents GROUP BY template_id HAVING count ( * )   >  1
turns.predict: SELECT * FROM Documents WHERE Template_ID IN (SELECT Template_ID FROM Documents GROUP BY Template_ID HAVING count(*) > 1)

turns.text: Find the first name of the students who permanently live in the country Haiti.

turns.query: SELECT T1.first_name FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.permanent_address_id   =   T2.address_id WHERE T2.country   =   'Haiti'
turns.predict: SELECT T1.first_name FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.permanent_address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T2.country = 'Haiti'

turns.text: Please also find the first name of the students who have the cell phone number 09700166582

turns.query: SELECT first_name FROM Students WHERE cell_mobile_number  =  '09700166582'
turns.predict: SELECT first_name FROM Students WHERE cell_mobile_number = '09700166582'

turns.text: Can you show me the last name and address for him? | Do you want his current address or the permanent address? | current address please

turns.query: SELECT T1.last_name, * FROM Students as T1 join addresses as T2 on T1.current_address_id  =  T2.address_id WHERE T1.cell_mobile_number  =  '09700166582'
turns.predict: SELECT T1.last_name, T2.line_1, T2.line_2, T2.line_3, T2.city, T2.zip_postcode, T2.state_province_county, T2.country FROM Students AS T1 JOIN Addresses AS T2 ON T1.current_address_id = T2.address_id WHERE T1.cell_mobile_number = '09700166582'

turns.text: Ok. Can you also give me his email address?

turns.query: SELECT email_address FROM Students where cell_mobile_number  =  '09700166582'
turns.predict: SELECT email_address FROM Students WHERE cell_mobile_number = '09700166582'

turns.text: how many female dogs have gone through treatment

turns.query: SELECT count ( * )  FROM Dogs WHERE dog_id IN  (  SELECT dog_id FROM Treatments  )
turns.predict: SELECT count(*) FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.dog_id = T2.dog_id WHERE T1.gender = 'Female'

turns.query: SELECT age FROM Dogs WHERE dog_id IN  (  SELECT dog_id FROM Treatments  )
turns.predict: SELECT T1.age FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.dog_id = T2.dog_id WHERE T1.gender = 'Female'

turns.text: what is the highest weight of age 2

turns.query: SELECT weight FROM Dogs WHERE age = 2 ORDER BY weight DESC LIMIT 1
turns.predict: SELECT MAX(T1.weight) FROM Dogs AS T1 JOIN Treatments AS T2 ON T1.dog_id = T2.dog_id WHERE T1.gender = 'Female' AND T1.age = '2'
